title: Assignments should not be made from within sub-expressions
description: A common code smell that can hinder the clarity of source code is making assignments within sub-expressions. This practice involves assigning a value to a variable inside a larger expression, such as within a loop or a conditional statement. This practice essentially gives a side-effect to a larger expression, thus making it less readable.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant: return (result = Calculate()); // Noncompliant - assignment within return
compliant:
result = Calculate(); // Compliant - separate assignment
return result;

checks.message: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
